case_studies.one_liner: The Lip Bar went from zero AI mentions to showing up across ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, and Gemini for high-intent beauty queries in 90 days.
case_studies.detail: 12 purchase-intent prompts, 6 brand-vs-brand prompts, 3 AI platforms with consistent mentions.

compound_growth.note: Prompts where your brand is recommended by AI. Results based on US market.

aggregate_stats.one_liner: Brands that start early build a compounding moat: 3 prompts in month 1, 8 by month 3, 18 by month 6, and 47 by month 12.
